central_schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
central_schemes.benefit: Rs 1.2-1.3 lakh grant for pucca house construction (rural)
central_schemes.eligibility: Homeless/kutcha house families in SECC list

central_schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
central_schemes.benefit: Interest subsidy 3-6.5% on home loan OR grant up to Rs 2.67 lakh

central_schemes.name: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS)
central_schemes.benefit: Home loan interest subsidy up to Rs 2.67 lakh for EWS/LIG
central_schemes.eligibility: First-time homebuyers with income < Rs 18 lakh/year

central_schemes.name: National Urban Livelihood Mission (Housing)
central_schemes.benefit: Affordable rental housing for urban poor

central_schemes.name: Indira Awas Yojana (IAY) Legacy Beneficiaries
central_schemes.benefit: Housing assistance for incomplete IAY houses
central_schemes.eligibility: Existing IAY beneficiaries with incomplete construction

central_schemes.name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor Housing Benefit)
central_schemes.benefit: Collateral-free working capital loans Rs 10K-50K + credit score benefit

central_schemes.name: Rajiv Awas Yojana
central_schemes.benefit: Slum rehabilitation and affordable housing for slum dwellers

central_schemes.name: PMAY NE States Special Package
central_schemes.benefit: Enhanced grant Rs 1.3 lakh for NE states and hill states

central_schemes.name: Housing for Plantation Workers
central_schemes.benefit: Housing assistance for tea and coffee plantation workers

central_schemes.name: Affordable Rental Housing Complexes (ARHC)
central_schemes.benefit: Low-cost rental accommodation for urban migrants

central_schemes.name: Valmiki Ambedkar Awas Yojana (VAMBAY)
central_schemes.benefit: Subsidized shelter for urban slum dwellers below poverty line

central_schemes.name: NHB Residex Scheme
central_schemes.benefit: Housing loan at reduced rates through NHB registered lenders
central_schemes.eligibility: Home loan seekers in notified cities

central_schemes.name: Global Housing Technology Challenge
central_schemes.benefit: Access to affordable innovative housing construction tech

central_schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana LIFE (PMAY-LIFE)
central_schemes.benefit: Turnkey housing via private builders under PMAY EWS category
central_schemes.eligibility: EWS category families not yet with permanent housing

state_schemes.benefit_en: Additional housing grant for urban slum dwellers not covered under PMAY
state_schemes.benefit_hi: PMAY से वंचित शहरी गरीबों को आवास सहायता
state_schemes.eligibility: Urban BPL families without own home in UP

state_schemes.benefit_en: Affordable flats and houses for EWS/LIG groups in WB
state_schemes.benefit_hi: EWS/LIG समूह के लिए किफायती फ्लैट
state_schemes.eligibility: WB EWS/LIG families without own house

state_schemes.benefit_en: State top-up of Rs 30,000-50,000 over PMAY for SC/ST/NT/OBC
state_schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST/NT/OBC के लिए PMAY के अतिरिक्त ₹30,000-50,000

state_schemes.name_en: Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana
state_schemes.benefit_en: Housing for SC/ST/OBC families with Rs 1.2 lakh state grant
state_schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ST/OBC परिवारों को ₹1.2 लाख राज्य अनुदान
state_schemes.eligibility: SC/ST/OBC BPL families in Gujarat without pucca house

state_schemes.benefit_en: State-funded house with basic amenities for homeless AP families
state_schemes.benefit_hi: बेघर AP परिवारों को बुनियादी सुविधाओं सहित घर
state_schemes.eligibility: AP homeless families not covered under PMAY

state_schemes.benefit_en: 3-room pucca house with Rs 2 lakh grant for homeless Jharkhand families
state_schemes.benefit_hi: बेघर परिवारों को ₹2 लाख में 3 कमरों का पक्का घर
state_schemes.eligibility: Jharkhand homeless families not covered under PMAY

state_schemes.benefit_en: Fully constructed house for homeless/landless families in Kerala
Housing for urban poor not covered under PMAY with state subsidy
state_schemes.benefit_hi: PMAY से छूटे शहरी गरीबों को राज्य आवास सहायता
state_schemes.eligibility: Urban MP BPL families without pucca house
